UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0520_UR_INCONT (M0520) Urinary Incontinence Urinary incontinence or urinary catheter presence. 00 = No incontinence or catheter (includes anuria or ostomy for urinary drainage)
01 = Patient is incontinent
02 = Patient requires a urinary catheter (e.g., external, indwelling, intermittent, suprapubic) CHAR 2 x x
M0530_UR_INCONT_OC (M0530) When Urinary Incontinence Occurs When urinary incontinence occurs. 00 = Timed voiding defers
